articles.title: Maharashtra-model in Bengal? Didi fights to fend off crisis amid MLA exodus buzz
articles.summary: The political landscape in Bengal is charged with speculation as a prominent BJP minister asserts that more than 50 Trinamool MLAs could defect amidst growing schisms within the party. This development comes on the heels of the 'Signgate' scandal, where ousted MLAs are claiming their signatures were forged for the Leader of Opposition position..

articles.title: UP PGT Result 2026 declared: 2,253 candidates qualify for interview round- here's how to check your marks
articles.summary: The Uttar Pradesh Education Service Selection Commission has announced the UP PGT written examination results for 2026. A total of 2,253 candidates have provisionally qualified for the interview round for 624 lecturer posts.

articles.title: TG Inter Supply Results 2026: Expected date and time
articles.summary: The Telangana State Board of Intermediate Education (TGBIE) is expected to release the TG Inter 1st and 2nd Year Advanced Supplementary Results 2026 between June 10 and June 16 at 11:00 AM IST. Conducted after exams held in May 2026, the results will be announced via official press conference in Hyderabad.

articles.title: The trust deficit at work: How ethical failures are driving employees to quit
articles.summary: A growing trust deficit is reshaping workplaces, with many employees questioning whether companies truly follow the values they promote. A Resume Now survey found that fears of retaliation, favouritism, and ethical inconsistencies are pushing workers toward silence and, increasingly, the exit door.

articles.title: Chandigarh Teacher Recruitment 2026 notification expected for 582 posts of NTT JBT TGT PGT
articles.summary: Chandigarh Teacher Recruitment 2026: Chandigarh Administration Department of Education has issued a public notice for upcoming recruitment of around 582 teaching posts across NTT, JBT, TGT and PGT categories. The official notification is expected by 31 July 2026, with applications likely to begin in August 2026.
